name: packetrush
description: 3D network traffic visualizer — every packet becomes a vehicle on a night highway, rendered live with Three.js

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --input-type=module --check < public/main.js && node --input-type=module --check < public/vehicles.js && node --input-type=module --check < public/themes.js && node --input-type=module --check < public/fleets.js

author: Thorsten Meyer
